title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_memory_layers.py (第 220 至 260 行，共 396 行) ---
 220 |     def setup(self):
 221 |         """每个测试前创建临时目录"""
 222 |         self.temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
 223 |         yield
 224 |         # 测试后清理
 225 |         shutil.rmtree(self.temp_dir, ignore_errors=True)
 226 | 
 227 |     def test_init(self):
 228 |         """测试初始化"""
 229 |         ltm = LongTermMemory(storage_dir=self.temp_dir)
 230 | 
 231 |         assert ltm.count() == 0
 232 |         assert Path(self.temp_dir).exists()
 233 | 
 234 |     def test_store_and_retrieve(self):
 235 |         """测试存储和检索"""
 236 |         ltm = LongTermMemory(storage_dir=self.temp_dir)
 237 | 
 238 |         summary = SessionSummary(
 239 |             session_id="test_1",
 240 |             timestamp="2024-01-01T00:00:00",
 241 |             summary_text="Test summary",
 242 |             task_goal="Test task",
 243 |             task_status="completed"
 244 |         )
 245 | 
 246 |         # 存储
 247 |         file_path = ltm.store(summary)
 248 |         assert file_path != ""
 249 |         assert ltm.count() == 1
 250 | 
 251 |         # 检索
 252 |         retrieved = ltm.retrieve("test_1")
 253 |         assert retrieved is not None
 254 |         assert retrieved.session_id == "test_1"
 255 |         assert retrieved.summary_text == "Test summary"
 256 | 
 257 |     def test_search(self):
 258 |         """测试关键词搜索"""
 259 |         ltm = LongTermMemory(storage_dir=self.temp_dir)
 260 | 
--- 读取完毕 ---
